questions.prompt: Look at the ____ bird. (提示: 淘气的)
questions.context_sentence: Look at the naughty bird.
questions.cn: 看那只淘气的鸟。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：“闹踢”——调皮的孩子又闹又踢。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.prompt: Look at the little dog. It's ____. (提示: 哭泣)
questions.context_sentence: Look at the little dog. It's crying.
questions.cn: 看那只小狗。它在哭泣。
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：弄碎（crack）了心爱的玩具，就会伤心哭泣（cry）。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: They look hungry.
questions.cn: 他们看起来很饿。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：“汉堡”——因为hungry，所以想吃汉堡。

questions.prompt: The ducks are eating our ____! (提示: 三明治)
questions.context_sentence: The ducks are eating our sandwiches!
questions.cn: 鸭子们正在吃我们的三明治！
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：sand(沙子) + which(哪一个)——哪一个(which)三明治掉进了沙子(sand)里？
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.prompt: In this photo, we are in the ____. (提示: 高山)
questions.context_sentence: In this photo, we are in the mountains.
questions.cn: 在这张照片中，我们在群山之中。
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：mount(登上) + ain(名词后缀)——可以去登上的地方就是高山。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: In this photo, we are in the mountains.
questions.cn: 在这张照片中，我们在群山之中。
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：mount(登上) + ain(名词后缀)——可以去登上的地方就是高山。

questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.prompt: The sun is shining and the wind is ____. (提示: 吹)
questions.context_sentence: The sun is shining and the wind is blowing.
questions.cn: 阳光普照，风在吹拂。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：“不漏”——风吹过来，门窗关紧一点不漏。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The sun is shining and the wind is blowing.
questions.cn: 阳光普照，风在吹拂。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：“不漏”——风吹过来，门窗关紧一点不漏。

questions.prompt: Simon and I are playing ____. (提示: 捉迷藏)
questions.context_sentence: Simon and I are playing hide-and-seek.
questions.cn: 西蒙和我正在玩捉迷藏。
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：hide(藏起来) + and(和) + seek(寻找)——有藏有找，就是捉迷藏游戏。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Simon and I are playing hide-and-seek.

questions.hint: 联想记忆法：hide(藏起来) + and(和) + seek(寻找)——有藏有找，就是捉迷藏游戏。

questions.prompt: And this is ____, because it is the middle of the night. (提示: 奇怪的)
questions.context_sentence: And this is strange, because it is the middle of the night.
questions.cn: 这很奇怪，因为现在是半夜。
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：stranger(陌生人)的举动常常让人觉得很strange(奇怪的)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: And this is strange, because it is the middle of the night.
questions.cn: 这很奇怪，因为现在是半夜。
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：stranger(陌生人)的举动常常让人觉得很strange(奇怪的)。

questions.prompt: "The sun is very bad. He ____ my time," she says. (提示: 破坏)
questions.context_sentence: "The sun is very bad. He spoils my time," she says.
questions.cn: 她说：‘太阳真讨厌。它破坏了我的时间。’
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：“死男孩(s-poil)”——调皮捣蛋破坏了大家的计划。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.prompt: We ____ in the park. (提示: 去野餐)
questions.context_sentence: We had a picnic in the park.
questions.cn: 我们在公园里野餐了。
questions.hint: 图像记忆法：带着漂亮的野餐垫，在大自然里拍美丽的picture(照片)。
